title: Security
description: This directory contains classes related to security in Hadoop MapReduce. It provides user-facing APIs for transferring secrets from the job client to the tasks, and includes methods for obtaining delegation tokens from namenodes corresponding to the paths passed. The code also includes methods for removing jobtoken referrals that don't make sense in the context of the task execution. The directory collaborates with other files or child directories to ensure secure execution of MapReduce jobs.

This directory contains classes related to security in Hadoop MapReduce. It provides user-facing APIs for transferring secrets from the job client to the tasks, and includes methods for obtaining delegation tokens from namenodes corresponding to the paths passed. The code also includes methods for removing jobtoken referrals that don't make sense in the context of the task execution. The directory collaborates with other files or child directories to ensure secure execution of MapReduce jobs.
